directories.name: MCP.so
directories.notes: Next.js web form submission. No public REST API for posting. Requires manual form fill via browser. Supports multiple locales (EN, ZH, JA).

directories.name: Smithery
directories.notes: Uses CLI tool 'npx @smithery/cli@latest deploy' for submission. Also accepts GitHub PR to registry repo. Has REST API for searching/listing servers but not for direct submission. Web form available via 'Publish' dropdown.

directories.name: Glama.ai
directories.notes: MCP server directory. Submission via web form after signing up. Servers are indexed from GitHub. No public POST API endpoint found for programmatic submission.

directories.name: PulseMCP
directories.notes: Cloudflare-protected site. Web form submission for MCP servers. Requires browser interaction due to Cloudflare challenge.

directories.name: OpenTools
directories.notes: Accepts POST requests to /api/tools with JSON body. Returns HTTP 201 on success. Content-Type: application/json required. Also has web form at /tools/submit. Headers: Origin may be checked.

directories.name: DevHunt
directories.notes: Web form submission for developer tools. Requires user login/authentication. No public POST API endpoint found. Built with Next.js.

directories.name: BetaList
directories.notes: Web form submission for early-stage startups. Requires sign-in. Redirects to /sign_in if not authenticated. No public POST API.

directories.name: ProductHunt
directories.notes: Web form submission via 'Upcoming' section. Requires maker account. Products must be submitted manually through the web interface. Cloudflare-protected. No public API for submission.

directories.name: AlternativeTo
directories.notes: Web form for submitting software alternatives. Cloudflare-protected. Requires manual submission through browser form.

directories.name: SaaSHub
directories.notes: Web form submission for SaaS products. Cloudflare-protected. Manual submission via browser form.

directories.name: MCP.Directory
directories.notes: Large MCP server directory (3000+ servers). Has 'Submit Server' button linking to web form. Also supports GitHub-based indexing. Built with Next.js.

directories.name: MCPDirectory.com
directories.notes: MCP server directory site. Landing page with submit option. Web form based submission.

directories.name: MCPRegistry.com
directories.notes: MCP server registry with landing page. Web form based submission for adding servers to registry.

directories.name: MCPTools.dev
directories.notes: MCP tools directory. No public submit form found at /submit (returns 404). May rely on GitHub scraping or manual curation.

directories.name: Futurepedia
directories.notes: AI tools directory. Web form submission for adding AI tools. Manual form fill required.

directories.name: AI Tools Directory (aitoolsdirectory.com)
directories.notes: Built on spread.name platform. Web-based listing. Submit via platform interface.

directories.name: ai-tools.directory
directories.notes: Automated AI tools directory. Has /submit-agent/ form. Primarily automated data collection but accepts feedback/submissions via web form.

directories.name: Aixploria
directories.notes: French AI tools directory. Web form submission for AI tools. Manual submission required.

directories.name: AIFindy
directories.notes: AI tools finder/directory. Web-based listing. Submit via contact form or manual process.

directories.name: Indie Hackers
directories.notes: Product submission for indie products. Requires login. Ember.js based web app. Firebase backend. Web form only.

directories.name: GitHub Topics (MCP Servers)
directories.notes: Uses GitHub API to add 'mcp-server' topic to repository. Requires GitHub token with repo access. PUT /repos/{owner}/{repo}/topics with Content-Type: application/json and Authorization: Bearer GH_TOKEN. Accept header: application/vnd.github.mercy-preview+json.

directories.name: Crunchbase
directories.notes: Business directory. Web form for organization/company submission. Requires manual data entry. No public POST API for submissions.

directories.name: Toolspedia.ai
directories.notes: Domain not resolving (HTTP 000). Site may be down or unreachable. Previously was an AI tools directory with web form submission.
